title: Best iPad deals this month
content:
Macworld

With a new iPad and iPad Air having launched in March 2025, now is a great time to grab a bargain on the iPad of your choice. As a general rule, you can find good savings on iPads at Amazon, Best Buy, and Target in the U.S., and at Amazon, John Lewis, and Currys in the U.K.

But if you’re looking for the best price on each model of iPad, read on for our handpicked deals. For each one you’ll find an automatically updated price comparison tool, so you can be sure you’re getting the best deal at this exact second, and our pick of the best options.

Best iPad deals

Here’s our pick of the best deals currently available across Apple’s range of iPads.

U.S.

  • Amazon, 10th gen iPad (64GB): $319 – The 2025 iPad (128GB) costs $349 so spend $30 more to get the new iPad.
  • Amazon, 10th-gen iPad (256GB): $429 – The 2025 iPad (256GB) costs $449 so spend $20 more to get the new iPad.
  • Walmart, iPad mini (A17 Pro, 128GB): $479 ($20 off, MSRP $499)
  • Amazon, iPad mini (A17 Pro, 256GB): $499 ($100 off, MSRP $599)
  • Amazon, 11-inch M2 iPad Air (512GB): $799 ($100 off, MSRP $899)
  • Amazon, 13-inch M2 iPad Air (128GB): $699 ($100 off, MSRP $799)
  • Amazon, 13-inch M2 iPad Air (256GB): $799 ($100 off, MSRP $899)
  • Amazon, 11-inch M4 iPad Pro (256GB, 8GB RAM): $899 ($100 off, MSRP $999)
  • Amazon, 11-inch M4 iPad Pro (1TB, 16GB RAM): $1,449 ($150 off with voucher, MSRP $1,599)
  • Amazon, 13-inch M4 iPad Pro (256GB, 8GB RAM): $1,099 ($200 off, MSRP $1,299)

U.K.

  • Amazon, 11th-gen iPad (2025, A16, 128GB): £314.97 (£14.03 off, RRP £329)
  • Amazon, 10th-gen iPad (2022, 64GB): £269 (£60 off, RRP was £329–Clearance)
  • Amazon, 11-inch iPad Air (2025, M3, 128GB): £559.97 (£39.03 off, RRP £599)
  • Amazon, 13-inch iPad Air (2025, M3, 128GB): £749 (£50 off, RRP £799)
  • Amazon, iPad mini (2024, A17 Pro, 128GB): £429 (£70 off, RRP £499)
  • Amazon, 11-inch M4 iPad Pro (256GB): £935 (£64 off, RRP £999)
  • Amazon, 13-inch M4 iPad Pro (256GB): £1,200 (£99 off, RRP £1,299)
  • Amazon, 13-inch M4 iPad Pro (1TB): £1,779.97 (£119.03 off, RRP £1,899)

Best iPad (A16 & 10th gen) deals

Apple’s cheapest tablet is generally branded as simply “iPad.” When it needs to differentiate, Apple calls the latest 2025 model the iPad (A16), and the previous one from 2022 the iPad (10th generation). We’re not sure why the company changed its naming convention from the 10th to the 11th generation.

Note that the older model came with half the storage at each price tier as well as an older processor, so if you find a deal on the 10th-gen iPad make sure it includes a hefty discount compared to the new model. We have a separate article dedicated to the best deals on the standard iPad.

Best iPad mini deals

The iPad mini is the smallest tablet Apple sells but not the cheapest; it sits between the standard iPad and the iPad Air in terms of price. The current model, the 7th-gen iPad mini, launched in 2024; avoid the 6th-gen mini from 2021 unless you find a truly monumental discount. We’ve got a separate article rounding up the best iPad mini deals, but here are the best we’re seeing right now:

Best iPad Air deals

The iPad Air comes in two sizes, each equipped with a speedy M3 processor as of March 2025. The older M2 version from 2024 remains a more than capable device that’s worth considering if you find a discount. We’ve also got a separate article rounding up all the best iPad Air deals, but here are the best we’ve seen this month:

Where to buy an iPad

If you’re simply looking to pick up a new iPad, there are plenty of stores that sell not only the latest models but older options that aren’t available from Apple any more—some at significant savings, too.

iPad buyers in the U.S. can check out the following stores:

  • Apple
  • Amazon
  • Best Buy
  • Costco
  • Target
  • Walmart

If you’re based in the U.K., you can pick up an iPad from the following retailers:

  • Apple
  • Amazon
  • Argos
  • Currys
  • John Lewis
  • KRCS
  • Very

Apple Refurbished Store

One of our favorite hunting grounds for a tasty iPad deal is the Apple Refurbished Store, where you’ll find iPads with huge discounts. These are items that have been returned, but in most respects you wouldn’t be able to tell.

Apple replaces the battery and outer shell of every refurbished iPad, and you’ll still get all of the accessories and manuals that would come with a new model. Plus, you’ll also get the same one-year warranty as you would with a brand-new iPad.

The only thing that gives the game away is the box: Apple replaces the original with a white box to prevent people from buying the discounted models and selling them as new.

Apple Education Store

Don’t forget students can get discounts on iPad devices as a part of Apple’s Education Discount.

That concludes our guide to the best iPad deals available right now. But if you’re unsure of which model you should pick up, take a look at our in-depth iPad buying guide.
